creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
The rpm port (misc/rpm-2.5.6) is out-dated.  As rpm 3.0 (which is
	used by the Linux emulation) converts the database in a specific
	format that is not known to rpm 2.5, this means that the native
	version of rpm cannot be used after the Linux version has been
	used.

Fix: 

Update port to rpm 3.0 or 4.0.
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
